2605.12039.title: SkillGraph: Skill-Augmented Reinforcement Learning for Agents via Evolving Skill Graphs
2605.12039.paper_summary: Skill libraries enable large language model agents to reuse experience from past interactions, but most existing libraries store skills as isolated entries and retrieve them only by semantic similarity. This leads to two key challenges for compositional tasks. Firstly, an agent must identify not only relevant skills but also how they depend on and build upon each other. Secondly, it also makes library maintenance difficult, since the system lacks structural cues for deciding when skills should be merged, split, or removed. We propose SKILLGRAPH, a framework that represents reusable skills as nodes in a directed graph, with typed edges encoding prerequisite, enhancement, and co-occurrence relations. Given a new task, SKILLGRAPH retrieves not just individual skills, but an ordered skill subgraph that can guide multi-step decision making. The graph is continuously updated from agent trajectories and reinforcement learning feedback, allowing both the skill library and the agent policy to improve together. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and seven search-augmented QA tasks show that SKILLGRAPH achieves state-of-the-art performance against memory-augmented RL methods, with especially large gains on complex tasks that require composing multiple skills.
2605.12039.paper_summary_zh: 技能庫使大型語言模型代理能夠重複利用過去互動的經驗，但大多數現有的庫將技能存儲為孤立的條目，並僅通過語義相似性進行檢索。這對於組合任務帶來了兩個主要挑戰。首先，代理必須識別不僅是相關技能，還有它們之間的依賴關係和相互構建的方式。其次，這也使得庫的維護變得困難，因為系統缺乏結構提示來決定何時應合併、拆分或刪除技能。我們提出了SKILLGRAPH，一個將可重用技能表示為有向圖中節點的框架，帶有編碼前提、增強和共現關係的類型邊緣。給定一個新任務，SKILLGRAPH不僅檢索單個技能，還檢索一個有序的技能子圖，以指導多步決策。該圖從代理的軌跡和強化學習反饋中不斷更新，允許技能庫和代理策略共同改進。在ALFWorld、WebShop和七個增強搜索的QA任務上的實驗顯示，SKILLGRAPH在記憶增強的強化學習方法中達到了最先進的性能，尤其在需要組合多個技能的複雜任務上獲得了特別大的增益。
2605.12039.author: Xiaoyuan Li et.al.
2605.12039.authors: Xiaoyuan Li, Moxin Li, Keqin Bao, Yubo Ma, Wenjie Wang, Dayiheng Liu, Fuli Feng
